content:
**Reconnaissance ant detected critical drift — 2026-04-30**

- https://card-nabi.vercel.app/cards: unexpected status 404 (expected 200)

See data/reconnaissance/reports/2026-04-30.md for full context.
If this finding is stable for 3+ days, escalate to a real fix or update HEALTH.json baselines.

**Agent voice probe drift (2026-04-30)**

- dashboard rankings returns array of >=1 services with id+category: json_path items: path missing
- dashboard recipes returns array: json_path items: path missing

Probe expectation no longer matches API response. Either the API changed (regression), the spec changed (intentional), or the probe is stale.
Review docs/specs/ for the relevant feature, update probe config if intentional, or fix the API.

**UI drift detected (2026-07-03)**

- https://kansei-link.com: 8.35% drift (> 5% threshold) (see data/reconnaissance/diffs/kanseilink/kansei-link-com_root.diff.png)

If intentional, no action needed (baseline is rolling).
If unintentional, this is the kind of "fix breaks UI" drift scope-locks Tier 5 visual regression would catch in CI.
